HERMES_API_URL.description: Base URL of Hermes' HTTP API. Both pods use hostNetwork; default works for same-host setups.

HERMES_TOKEN.description: Bearer token oscar-household presents when calling Hermes (matches Hermes' API_SERVER_KEY, set during `hermes setup` or auto-generated by the ServiceBay `hermes` template).

HA_MCP_TOKEN.description: Long-lived access token from Home Assistant (Profile → Long-lived access tokens) **or** an Authelia OIDC client secret. Used to register HA's native MCP server with Hermes.

SERVICEBAY_MCP_TOKEN.description: ServiceBay-MCP bearer token (Settings → Integrations → MCP → Generate token, scope `read+lifecycle`). Used to register ServiceBay-MCP with Hermes.

LLDAP_GROUP.description: LLDAP group whose members are considered family (versus guests). Members get personal harnesses in Phase 2; non-members get the guest harness.

GATEKEEPER_IMAGE.description: Image tag for OSCAR's gatekeeper sidecar — consumed by ServiceBay's extended `voice` template (Phase 1). Leave default unless you're running a fork PoC.

OSCAR_DEBUG_MODE.description: Initial debug-mode default for `system_settings.debug_mode.active`. `true` during build phases, flip to `false` for productive household use (controllable at runtime via the `oscar-debug-set` skill).

TZ.description: IANA time zone for log timestamps.
